examples.name: Basic Chat with Memory
examples.description: Simple chat that maintains conversation history

examples.name: Agent with Tools
examples.description: AI Agent that can execute bash commands and HTTP requests

examples.name: Multi-Model Consensus
examples.description: Ask multiple models and compare responses

curl_examples.continue_conversation:
curl -X POST http://localhost:8765/chat \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"message": "What did I say before?", "conversation_id": "abc123", "model": "gemini"}'
curl_examples.register_tool:
curl -X POST http://localhost:8765/tools/register \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "name": "weather",
    "description": "Get weather for a city",
    "parameters": {"city": {"type": "string"}},
    "endpoint": "http://api.weather.com/v1/current"
  }'
